concerns.text: SC-006 (Data acquisition quality measured against EMP/MG-RAST availability, disease dataset completeness, and matched sample count) has no dedicated task to measure or verify this success criterion. T013/T014 download data and T016 matches samples, but no task explicitly tracks/reports the quality metrics required by SC-006.

T013 proceeds with EMP/MG-RAST data download despite plan.md explicitly marking Constitution Principle II as BLOCKING due to unverified datasets. No task exists to verify dataset sources before download proceeds, creating a logical contradiction with the blocking gate.

T009 implements power analysis but lacks explicit verification criteria matching FR-015's requirements (power ≥0.8, effect size ≥0.1). Task description should include how these thresholds will be validated.
Tasks file contains template/sample tasks warning comment that should be removed. While actual task content exists, this template artifact remains in the generated file.
FR-005 requires 'sufficient number of permutations' but T027 hardcodes 10,000 without documenting the sufficiency justification against the spec's open-ended requirement.
